title: OpenCosmos Processing Extension
description: STAC OpenCosmos Processing Extension for calibration, georeferencing and processing-pipeline metadata produced while generating a product. Owns the opencosmos:calibration:, opencosmos:georeference: and opencosmos:process: namespaces.

oneOf.$comment: This is the schema for STAC Items.

opencosmos:calibration:time_sync_offset.title: Time Sync Offset
opencosmos:calibration:time_sync_offset.description: Time synchronisation offset applied during calibration, in seconds.

opencosmos:process:ready.title: Process Ready
opencosmos:process:ready.description: Indicates whether the item is ready for downstream processing.

calibration_georeference.title: Calibration Georeference
calibration_georeference.description: Statistics describing the ephemeris and attitude data used to georeference the product.

attitude_interp_mode.title: Attitude Interpolation Mode
attitude_interp_mode.description: Interpolation mode used for attitude data.

position_velocity_interp_mode.title: Position/Velocity Interpolation Mode
position_velocity_interp_mode.description: Interpolation mode used for position and velocity data.

avg_angular_rate_frequency_hz.title: Average Angular Rate Frequency (Hz)
avg_angular_rate_frequency_hz.description: Average frequency of angular rate samples, in Hertz.

avg_attitude_frequency_hz.title: Average Attitude Frequency (Hz)
avg_attitude_frequency_hz.description: Average frequency of attitude samples, in Hertz.

avg_position_frequency_hz.title: Average Position Frequency (Hz)
avg_position_frequency_hz.description: Average frequency of position samples, in Hertz.

avg_velocity_frequency_hz.title: Average Velocity Frequency (Hz)
avg_velocity_frequency_hz.description: Average frequency of velocity samples, in Hertz.

no_angularRates.title: Number of Angular Rates
no_angularRates.description: Number of angular rate samples used.

no_angular_rates.title: Number of Angular Rates (snake_case variant)
no_angular_rates.description: Number of angular rate samples used. Alternate snake_case spelling of no_angularRates emitted by some pipeline versions.
